title: Placement drive E2E — college approve, student apply, employer select
oneLiner: After a GT-* drive is requested: college approves (if needed), student applies, employer shortlists and selects.

steps.label: Log in as college admin
steps.observe: College hub loads. Approve the employer drive if it is still Awaiting Approval.

steps.label: Open college Placement Drives
steps.observe: Find the row with your GT- session marker in the drive title.

steps.label: Approve guided drive (if still requested)
steps.observe: Click Approve on the {{marker}} row — skipped if already Approved.

steps.label: Confirm Approved status
steps.observe: Status pill shows Approved. Handoff to Student.

steps.label: Log in as student (Arjun Verma)
steps.observe: Student dashboard loads. Primary CV must exist on profile to apply.

steps.label: Open Browse Placement Drives
steps.observe: Approved / scheduled drives visible for IIT Madras.

steps.label: Search for the guided drive by marker
steps.observe: Card list filters to {{marker}} in the role/title line.

steps.label: Click Apply now on the guided drive
Confirm application in modal
steps.observe: Success toast; card shows Applied badge.

steps.label: Confirm Applied status on drive card
steps.observe: Same card shows Applied (not Apply now).

steps.label: Open Applications — Jobs tab (placement drives)
steps.observe: Jobs tab shows drive applicants (not internship program applications).

steps.label: Search applicants by guided drive marker
steps.observe: Filters to Arjun Verma for the GT- drive opening.

action.placeholder: Search by name, email, college, or opening

steps.label: Shortlist the applicant
steps.observe: Status changes from Applied to Shortlisted.

steps.label: Filter list to Selected and confirm
Log in as student — verify Selected status
steps.observe: My Applications → Drives shows Selected for {{marker}} drive.

steps.label: Open My Applications — Drives
steps.observe: Application for GT- drive shows Selected (or latest employer status).
